source: Notion: 🔥 LinkedIn Viral Health Posts (Raw Viral 1k+ filter)
note: Extracted opening hooks from high-engagement LinkedIn health posts. Each entry tagged with closest Outcurve persona match and hook shape. Refresh manually as new posts are added to the source database.

shape_legend.contrarian: Reverses a mainstream belief — 'X is dead', 'You may have heard Y, the truth is Z'
shape_legend.listicle: Numbered or pillared structure announced upfront — '3 things I stopped believing'
shape_legend.question: Opens with a direct question to the reader
shape_legend.story: Personal or named-character narrative with specifics
shape_legend.declarative: Confident statement of fact, often big-picture
shape_legend.problem_led: Names a recognizable pain or frustration the reader has
shape_legend.data_led: Leads with a specific stat, study, or quantitative finding

hooks.hook: Protein supplements are officially dead, and here's what's taking its place
hooks.author: Jake Heyen
hooks.notes: Reversal hook + promise of replacement. Works because it's both a death-knell and a lead to the new thing.

hooks.hook: 3 things I stopped believing about longevity:
hooks.author: Joseph Raffaele, MD
hooks.notes: Authority + reversal. 'Stopped believing' creates intrigue — implies hard-won perspective from experience.

hooks.hook: Magnesium isn't one supplement. It's 4 different tools. (7 actually, but I am sharing the most potent 4.) And you may be using the wrong one.
hooks.author: Marianne Tafani
hooks.notes: Reframe + parenthetical credibility-flex + reader-implicates-self. The '(7 actually, but...)' aside signals depth.

hooks.hook: You may have heard that genetics accounts for just 7% of how long you live. The pendulum has swung back. A landmark study published in Science in January 2026 now puts that number above 50%.
hooks.author: Eric Verdin
hooks.notes: Acknowledges the reader's prior — then flips it with a named, dated study. Specific number (7% → 50%) creates a clean before/after.

hooks.hook: A few things in the wellness industry genuinely concern me. Here are 3 you've likely been hearing about: IV vitamin drips. Your $700 infusion of ingredients costs roughly $2 to $5 to produce.
hooks.author: Eric Verdin
hooks.notes: Personal stake ('genuinely concern me') + insider reveal (cost margin). Highest engagement in the corpus.

hooks.hook: The WHO Just Redefined Longevity—And Most of Medicine Hasn't Caught Up. For decades, we've treated aging as a disease accumulation problem. The World Health Organization reframed it entirely.
hooks.author: Stuart Diamond MD
hooks.notes: Authority body (WHO) + the rest of medicine is behind. Positions reader as in-the-know.

hooks.hook: We tell patients to exercise. We're usually vague about the dose. A 2025 UK Biobank study put real numbers on it — using accelerometers, not self-report.
hooks.author: Daniel Carlat
hooks.notes: Self-implication ('we' = clinicians) + named methodology callout (accelerometers vs self-report). Targets a data-skeptical audience.

hooks.hook: For too long, the longevity conversation has begun and ended with muscle. Muscle is essential but muscle alone does not make movement accessible across a lifetime.
hooks.author: Vonda Wright MD
hooks.notes: 'For too long' is a classic reversal opener — suggests the reader's been operating on incomplete info.

hooks.hook: We tend to think of longevity as something that starts later in life. But the reality is very different.
hooks.author: Mafalda Honório
hooks.notes: Plain-language reversal. Light on detail in the hook itself but earns the click.

hooks.hook: Whenever I don't feel like working out, I remind myself of this: Lean muscle mass isn't about aesthetics. Sure, it looks great. But what matters most is what muscle does for your health.
hooks.author: Ketty Minissale
hooks.notes: Personal-confession opener + reframe from aesthetics to function. Top engagement — relatable trigger ('don't feel like') wins.

hooks.hook: 6 months ago, completing a 3km run felt hard. This Sunday, I finished my first HYROX singles open.
hooks.author: Balaji Soundararaj
hooks.notes: Specific timeframe + specific distance change. Earns trust via concrete numbers.

hooks.hook: Is this man the greatest endurance athlete in history?
hooks.author: Adam Acworth
hooks.notes: Open-question hook drives comments and replies. Works when followed by genuinely impressive evidence.

hooks.hook: I am often asked: 'At what age should we start caring about skin longevity?' My answer is always: at any age. It is never too early.
hooks.author: Vania LACASCADE
hooks.notes: Frames the writer as the authority being asked — then flips the implicit assumption ('start caring late').

hooks.hook: From a webcam and an idea to a working AI recovery system in 24 hours. No wearables. No backend. No server. Just a browser, a camera, and a team that refused to sleep.
hooks.author: Dhruv Patel
hooks.notes: Specific time constraint + the negative-space pattern ('No X. No Y. Just Z.') sells the surprise of what they didn't need.

hooks.hook: Creatine for Perimenopause & Menopause. As estrogen levels decline in perimenopause and menopause, many women may experience: reduced neuromuscular efficiency, slower recovery, increased muscle loss.
hooks.author: Stacy T. Sims, PhD
hooks.notes: Authority figure (Sims) + niche-specific compound match. Direct-target hook; no waste.

hooks.hook: DKA Diabetic Ketoacidosis: Recognition & Nursing Priorities (Quick Guide). DKA is a life-threatening metabolic emergency that requires rapid recognition and aggressive management.
hooks.author: Sheryl Mazil
hooks.notes: Clinical-utility hook (the '(Quick Guide)' parenthetical promises bounded, useful content).

hooks.hook: GLP-1 weight loss drugs aren't just shedding pounds, they could also reshape mortality trends. Our research suggests GLP-1s could reduce mortality by up to 6% in the US by 2045.
hooks.author: Swiss Re
hooks.notes: 'Aren't just X, also Y' is a versatile reframe. Specific stat (6% by 2045) anchors credibility.

hooks.hook: Medications that can complicate diabetes control. A patient with well-controlled diabetes suddenly has spiked readings — the culprit might be a new prescription.
hooks.author: Antonina Sanders
hooks.notes: Named the puzzle (suddenly spiked readings, no obvious cause) before naming the answer. Mirrors how the reader is feeling.

hooks.hook: Are you ready for it???? While most people are still scrolling they've already gone to sleep. Not because they're tired. Because they understand this: Recovery is performance.
hooks.author: Joy Mcadams
hooks.notes: Tribal-positioning hook ('most people' vs 'they who understand'). The 'not because X, because Y' beat reframes.

hooks.hook: Zealand Pharma Announces Phase 3 Win for Survodutide. A major milestone in the obesity and metabolic health space — survodutide delivered up to 16.6% weight loss over 76 weeks.
hooks.author: Archie Reaney
hooks.notes: News + specific outcome stat (16.6% / 76 weeks). Credibility via numerals.

hooks.hook: SECOND WORLD MAJOR MARATHON. Yesterday, Caleb completed his second full marathon in London. The crowd support was electric and he was truly in his element; high-fives and fist bumps for an entire 26.2 miles.
hooks.author: Karen Prewitt
hooks.notes: Caps-lock milestone + named character + sensory detail. Works for personal-narrative shapes.

hooks.hook: If you have ever needed medicine, biotechnology is what makes it possible. More than 100 million Americans live with a condition that can be treated, however millions more are still waiting for the next breakthrough.
hooks.author: Deborah Glasser
hooks.notes: Universal-experience opener ('if you have ever') + specific stat. Lower engagement — works for advocacy more than personal targeting.

hooks.hook: A longer life is a gift, but it also asks more of us than just a strong financial plan.
hooks.author: Aimee DeCamillo
hooks.notes: Aphoristic open. Earns the click via the unexpected pivot ('asks more of us').

hooks.hook: What #skin reveals about aging - a measurable interface of biological ageing.
hooks.author: Andrea B. Maier
hooks.notes: Reframes a familiar surface (skin) as a measurable signal. 'Measurable interface' is the credibility lift.

hooks.hook: The AI revolution in technology is inescapable right now, and with good reason. It has been quietly powering Oura Ring for over a decade.
hooks.author: Tom Hale
hooks.notes: Bandwagon ack + insider reveal ('quietly powering ... for over a decade').

hooks.hook: 15 years after Génifique, Lancôme is making history again 🔥
hooks.author: Elena Perez
hooks.notes: Brand-anchor hook ('15 years after [iconic product]'). Works when the audience knows the reference.
